Container.Name: uup-dump-windows-iso-experimental
Container.Overview: EXPERIMENTAL, not the main image. Same as uup-dump-windows-iso, but adds a WinPE/QEMU/KVM step that runs real DISM to actually integrate Windows updates into the ISO. Needs /dev/kvm and /dev/fuse. Test only -- see EXPERIMENTAL.md in the repo.
Container.Description: EXPERIMENTAL build -- see https://github.com/KrX3D/uup-dump-get-latest-windows-iso/blob/experimental/winpe-dism-updates/EXPERIMENTAL.md before using.[br][br] Adds a step that boots the ISO's own boot.wim under QEMU/KVM to run real dism.exe /Add-Package against install.wim, so "Include Windows Updates" actually gets slipstreamed instead of being a no-op (see main image's known limitation on Linux/wimlib).[br][br] Requires the Unraid host to have KVM available (Settings -> VM Manager enabled) and the /dev/kvm + /dev/fuse devices + SYS_ADMIN capability set via ExtraParams (already included in this template).[br][br] If /dev/kvm is missing, or any step of the WinPE integration fails, the build falls back to an unpatched ISO and logs a warning -- it should never break a build outright, but this path is untested on real hardware. Please report results (success or failure, with winpe-dism-run.log from the Log Directory) on the GitHub issue tracker.

Config.Name: ISO Output Path
Config.Description: Where the finished ISO, checksum, and metadata files are saved.

Config.Name: Log Directory
Config.Description: Where uup-dump.log, per-run logs, and winpe-dism-run.log are written.

Config.Name: Config Directory
Config.Description: Stores settings.json and build logs for the web UI.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the web configuration UI. Only active when MODE=web.

Config.Name: Mode
Config.Description: auto = build on container start. web = start the configuration web UI instead.

Config.Name: EXPERIMENTAL_WINPE_UPDATES
Config.Description: 1 = attempt real DISM update integration via WinPE/QEMU when 'Include Windows Updates' is checked. 0 = behave exactly like the main image (no-op with a warning).

Config.Name: Windows Ring
Config.Description: RETAIL, DEV, BETA, CANARY, RP, or ANY.
